default_strike.text:
Requires an imbued with 5 conviction [5CONVICTION]. Only usable before range is determined on the first round.
If two consecutive rounds of combat occur at close range and this imbued remains ready, this imbued burns 5 conviction [5CONVICTION] during the press step of that second round to burn himself or herself and the opposing monster. Otherwise, this imbued burns 1 conviction [1CONVICTION] when combat ends.
